data.title: Meta And YouTube Remove Accounts Of Luigi Mangione, But X Reinstates Profile: Elon Musk Says, 'Happened Without My Knowledge'
data.description: Meta and YouTube swiftly removed the accounts of Luigi Mangione, the suspect in UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson's murder, while Elon Musk's X reinstated his profile after a brief suspension, drawing attention amid an ongoing investigation into the high-profile case.

data.title: Changpeng 'CZ' Zhao Says Bitcoin Will Be Viewed As Just 'Money' In The Future, Believes Perception Would Shift From Price And $100K Milestones
data.description: Changpeng Zhao, the founder of the world's biggest cryptocurrency exchange, Binance, said Monday that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) would transition from a speculative investment to a utility asset over the next decade.

data.title: Bitcoin Far More Of A Threat Than A BRICS Reserve Currency, Says Jeremy Siegel: Find It 'Curious' That Trump Championed BTC At 100K
data.description: As President-elect Donald Trump threatened BRICS countries against a reserve currency, economist Jeremy Siegel says “Bitcoin is far more of a threat to replace the dollar in world reserves than anything created by the emerging market economies.”

data.title: Russia Weighs Bitcoin Reserve As Deputy Warns Sanctions Leave Crypto 'Only Instrument For Trade' Amid Trump's Pro-Bitcoin Push
data.description: Russia is considering establishing a strategic Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) reserve amid growing tensions with Western financial systems and following President-elect Donald Trump‘s pro-cryptocurrency stance in the United States.

data.title: Tim Kuniskis To Return To Lead Ram Trucks Days After Stellantis CEO's Departure: Report
data.description: Former Stellantis executive Tim Kuniskis is reportedly returning to the company to lead its Ram Trucks brand merely days after Carlos Tavares resigned as company CEO.
